name: Shin Maint Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shin Maint Holdings Co., Ltd. provides maintenance services in Japan. It offers facilities equipment, and interior and exterior related maintenance services. The company was formerly known as Shin Pro Maint Inc. and changed its name to Shin Maint Holdings Co., Ltd. in September 2017. Shin Maint Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
